Prediction: Yes

The current visit record explicitly mentions "Pure hypercholesterolemia" as a diagnosis. This is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is documented, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded during their next hospital visit, as there is strong and explicit evidence of an existing lipid disorder that is likely to be managed or monitored in future visits.
